info.title: HL Indexer API
info.description:
API to query indexed Hyperliquid trading data.

This API provides access to stored/indexed trading data:
- **Fills**: Executed orders and fills (Spot-only or All = Spot + Perp)
- **Analytics**: Aggregations and statistics based on indexed data
- **Completed Trades**: Trade objects and their related fills
- **Users**: User overviews, performance and activity
- **Builders**: Builder fee analytics and rankings
- **Funding**: Funding rate history, user funding payments, predicted rates
- **HIP-3**: DEX registry, assets, auctions, OHLCV, oracle stats, fills
- **Liquidations**: Liquidation events with filters
- **Overview**: Market dashboard metrics (volume, fees, traders, PnL)
- **Spot**: Spot token metadata, pairs, and auctions
- **TWAPs**: TWAP orders, execution stats and fills
- **Vaults**: Vault details, summaries, equity, ledger
- **EVM**: Blocks, transactions, event logs, ledger transfers, bridge events

> Note: No live streaming. Responses are computed from indexed data.

tags.name: HIP-3
tags.description: HIP-3 DEXs, assets, auctions, fills and analytics.

tags.name: Spot
tags.description: Spot token metadata, pairs and auctions.

tags.name: Vaults
tags.description: Vault details, summaries, equity and ledger.

tags.name: EVM
tags.description: EVM blockchain data: blocks, transactions, logs, ledger transfers, bridge events.

get.description: Returns fills across Spot and Perp.
Recent fills (live table, 24h TTL) — same filters as `/fills`, faster responses for the recent time window.

Returns user fills. By default, only recent data (from March 2025 onward) is available. Historical data prior to March 2025 is exclusively available on Scale & Enterprise plans via the `start_time` / `end_time` parameters. This is currently the only endpoint supporting pre-March historical access.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start time (ISO UTC). Required for Scale/Enterprise historical access. Overrides time_range.

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End time (ISO UTC). Defaults to now if start_time is set.

get.description: Aggregated stats derived from indexed fills.
Liquidation statistics for the last `days` days window.
Returns completed trades. Defaults to a 24h window if no time filters are provided.
Ranked list of builders by volume, fees, fills or users for a given timeframe.
Aggregated builder metrics (current, previous period, and variations).
Returns builder stats for 1h, 24h, 7d and 30d in a single call.
Per-coin breakdown and period-over-period variations for a specific builder.
Top users ranked by builder fees for a specific builder.
Returns all known builders with address, name and referrer info.
Hourly funding snapshots for a coin. Returns fundingRate, premium and time.
Funding payments for a user. Returns time, coin, usdc, szi, delta.
Latest funding snapshot per coin (predicted next funding).
Aggregated HIP-3 statistics.
Top HIP-3 assets by price movement.
Returns all registered HIP-3 DEXs.
Returns HIP-3 asset configurations. Optionally filter by DEX or search term.
Returns the currently active auction, or null if none.
Latest price/volume snapshots for HIP-3 assets.
OHLCV candlestick data for a HIP-3 asset.
1-minute oracle price statistics for a DEX.
Fills on HIP-3 markets.
Aggregated trader statistics on HIP-3 markets.
Liquidation events with optional filters on coin, user, notional amount and time range.
Recent liquidation events (defaults to 2h window). Same filters as `/liquidations/`.
Top traders in the last 24 hours ranked by PnL, volume or trades.
Global dashboard metrics: volume, fees, unique traders, PnL.
Returns spot token metadata.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by token name or symbol

get.description: Returns TWAP orders with optional filters.
Aggregated TWAP execution statistics.
Total blocks, transactions, logs indexed and block range.
Daily block and transaction counts over a configurable lookback window.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to look back

get.description: Returns EVM blocks with optional filters on block range and time range.
Returns a single EVM block by its block number.
Returns EVM transactions with optional filters.
Returns all transactions in a given block.
Returns EVM event logs with optional filters on block, contract address, and event signature.
L1 ledger transfers including withdraw3, usdSend, spotSend, sendAsset, usdClassTransfer, subAccountTransfer, vaultTransfer.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Filter by user address (from or to)

get.description: Bridge deposit votes, withdrawal finalizations, and signature events.

get.summary: Non-funding ledger events for a user
get.description:
Unified non-funding ledger history for a user. Combines ledger_transfers (usdSend, spotSend, sendAsset, withdraw3, usdClassTransfer, subAccountTransfer, vaultTransfer) and evm_bridge_events (deposit_vote, withdrawal_finalized).

Event types:
- `deposit` — bridge deposit into Hyperliquid
- `withdrawal` — withdraw3 or bridge withdrawal finalized
- `transfer_in` — received via usdSend/spotSend/sendAsset
- `transfer_out` — sent via usdSend/spotSend/sendAsset
- `class_transfer` — perp ↔ spot USDC transfer
- `sub_account` — sub-account transfer
- `vault` — vault deposit/withdrawal

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: Filter by event type(s) (repeat param for multiple)

get.summary: Aggregated ledger summary per action type for a user
get.description: Count and total amount per action type across all ledger transfers involving this user.
